fix.item: Fixed Auto Preview not triggering correctly after selecting an image
Fixed Generate Preview causing a full page refresh
Fixed selected image file being cleared after preview generation
Fixed filename prefix validation JavaScript error

change.item: Improved New Photo usability for editorial workflows

improvement.item: Improved stability of Auto Preview and manual preview generation

note.item: This is a stability and usability update for the first public release
Recommended update for all users of version 1.0.0

addition.item: Added article-ready JPG image generation from JPG, PNG and WEBP uploads
Added per-image output size selection: 1200 × 800 and 1620 × 1080
Added crop position and zoom controls
Added Auto Preview without full page refresh
Added optional center watermark overlay support
Added Joomla Options for JPG quality, save folder, default prefix and max source size

change.item: Output size is selected per image to avoid accidental global size changes
Default JPG compression optimized for lightweight article images
Generated files use Latin-only filename prefixes for safer server compatibility

security.item: Restricted uploads to JPG, JPEG, PNG and WEBP image files
Added max source megapixels setting to protect server memory
Added ACL and CSRF protection for administrator actions

note.item: Initial public release for Joomla 6 news and editorial websites
Always test on a staging environment before using in production
